items.name: auth-errors
items.title: Auth Errors
items.description: Error-code mapping and GraphQL/validation error parsing for auth blocks. Zero imports; foundation lib shared by every auth block.

items.name: auth-schemas
items.title: Auth Schemas
items.description: Zod validation schemas for auth forms (Wave 0 ships the login subset). Foundation lib shared by auth blocks.

items.name: auth-error-alert
items.title: Auth Error Alert
items.description: Inline animated error banner for auth forms. Collapses to zero height when there is no error so layout never jumps.

items.name: form-field
items.title: Form Field
items.description: Label + input + inline error wrapper bound to a TanStack Form field. Wraps @constructive-io/ui FormControl + Input.

items.name: auth-loading-button
items.title: Auth Loading Button
items.description: Submit button that shows a spinner + loading label and self-disables while a request is in flight. Wraps @constructive-io/ui Button.

items.name: blocks-runtime
items.title: Blocks Runtime
items.description: The single wiring point for Constructive data blocks. Reuse-or-mount a shared QueryClient, configure each generated SDK namespace, and attach a per-request Bearer token. Mount once at the app root.
items.docs:
## Setup

`blocks-runtime` is the ONE wiring point for Constructive data blocks. Mount `<BlocksRuntime>` once at your app root; every data block declares it as a dependency.

```tsx
import { BlocksRuntime } from '@/blocks/runtime/blocks-runtime';
import { tokenManager } from '@/lib/auth/token-manager';

<BlocksRuntime namespaces={['auth', 'admin']} getToken={() => tokenManager.getAccessToken()}>
  {children}
</BlocksRuntime>
```

### Required env

Each namespace reads `NEXT_PUBLIC_<NS>_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT` (e.g. `NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT`).

### Generated SDKs

Each namespace must have a generated SDK at `@/generated/<ns>` exporting `configure()`. Blocks import their hooks from there — the runtime never ships those types.

### Adding a namespace

Extend the `BlocksNamespace` union plus the `CONFIGURERS` and `ENDPOINTS` maps in this file — the single expected edit, since it is your app's wiring point, not a leaf block.

items.name: auth-sign-in-card
items.title: Sign-in Card
items.description: Email + password sign-in card bound to the host's generated useSignInMutation. Inline error mapping, MFA/unverified branches via onMessage, and an onSubmit override seam for non-Constructive backends.
items.docs:
## Setup

1. Mount `blocks-runtime` once at your app root (installed automatically as a dependency) and set `NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_GRAPHQL_ENDPOINT`.
2. This block imports `useSignInMutation` from your generated `auth` SDK at `@/generated/auth`. Ensure that SDK is generated.

```tsx
import { SignInCard } from '@/blocks/auth/sign-in-card/sign-in-card';

<SignInCard onSuccess={(r) => router.push('/')} forgotPasswordHref="/forgot" signUpHref="/register" />
```

The declared requirements ship to `.constructive/blocks/auth-sign-in-card.requires.json` for the SDK check tool.

items.name: password-strength
items.title: Password Strength
items.description: Lightweight, dependency-free password-strength estimator (0–4 score + label) for inline sign-up/reset UX. Zero imports; foundation lib shared by auth blocks.

items.name: user-avatar
items.title: User Avatar
items.description: Avatar with image and generated-initials fallback for a user. Presentational only — takes user fields as props; no data binding.

items.name: auth-sign-out-button
items.title: Sign-out Button
items.description: Button bound to the host's generated useSignOutMutation. Clears cached queries on success; feedback via onSuccess/onError; onSubmit override seam for non-Constructive backends.

items.name: auth-forgot-password-card
items.title: Forgot-password Card
items.description: Email-entry card bound to the host's generated useForgotPasswordMutation. Always shows a neutral confirmation (no account enumeration); inline error mapping; onSubmit override seam.

items.name: auth-reset-password-card
items.title: Reset-password Card
items.description: New-password card bound to the host's generated useResetPasswordMutation. Reads token/roleId from props or URL, inline strength meter, expired/invalid/missing-token states; onSubmit override seam.

items.name: auth-sign-up-card
items.title: Sign-up Card
items.description: Email + password registration card bound to the host's generated useSignUpMutation. Inline password-strength meter, confirm-match validation, inline error mapping; onSubmit override seam.

items.name: auth-step-up-dialog
items.title: Step-up Dialog
items.description: Re-authentication dialog bound to the host's generated useRequireStepUpQuery + useVerifyPasswordMutation/useVerifyTotpMutation. Short-circuits when step-up is already satisfied; onSubmit override seam.

items.name: use-step-up
items.title: useStepUp
items.description: Imperative step-up trigger: a provider + hook that mounts the step-up dialog on demand and resolves a Promise when the user verifies. Wraps auth-step-up-dialog.

items.name: auth-account-emails-list
items.title: Account Emails List
items.description: Manage a user's email addresses bound to the host's generated useEmailsQuery + create/update/delete/send-verification mutations. Add, verify, set-primary, and remove emails; onSubmit override seam.

items.name: auth-sign-in-page
items.title: auth-sign-in-page
items.description: Thin Next.js page wrapper that composes auth-sign-in-card into a centered full-viewport layout with router glue: reads ?redirect= from useSearchParams, validates same-origin with URL-parse guard, routes to MFA_PATH with challenge token on mfaRequired, delegates all data/form logic to SignInCard.

items.name: auth-sign-up-page
items.title: auth-sign-up-page
items.description: Thin Next.js 15 page composing auth-sign-up-card with centered layout and post-registration redirect logic.

items.name: auth-forgot-password-page
items.title: Forgot Password Page
items.description: Next.js 15 page composing auth-forgot-password-card inside a centered layout, pre-filling email from ?email= searchParam.

items.name: auth-reset-password-page
items.title: Reset Password Page
items.description: Thin Next.js 15 page wrapper for auth-reset-password-card: reads ?token= and ?role_id= from URL searchParams and passes them as props to the card, routes to sign-in on success.

items.name: auth-verify-email-page
items.title: auth-verify-email-page (blocker fixes)
items.description: Fixed two blockers and two minors in the auth-verify-email-page block. All 11 tests pass, zero TSC errors in the block's own files.

items.name: auth-verify-email-banner
items.title: auth-verify-email-banner
items.description: Dismissible top-of-page banner for authenticated users whose primary email is not yet verified. Includes a resend verification email CTA backed by the host's generated useSendVerificationEmailMutation hook.

items.name: auth-change-password-form
items.title: Change Password Form
items.description: Authenticated inline form to update current password, with step-up (tier: medium) gate, password-strength meter, confirm mismatch guard, and full error mapping.

items.name: auth-account-profile-card
items.title: auth-account-profile-card
items.description: Allows the signed-in user to update their display_name and profile_picture. Renders person or organization name fields based on user.type. Profile picture changes use an optimistic preview; the raw File is passed via userPatch.profilePictureUpload (the ORM-native upload field) rather than being embedded in an ImageJsonb.

items.name: auth-account-sessions-list
items.title: Account Sessions List
items.description: Lists the signed-in user's active sessions (host-supplied via adapter seam) and provides per-session and bulk revoke actions, both gated behind step-up verification.

items.name: auth-account-connected-accounts
items.title: auth-account-connected-accounts
items.description: Settings card listing linked OAuth providers with disconnect (step-up gated) and connect-via-OAuth links.

items.name: auth-passkey-management-list
items.title: auth-passkey-management-list (blocker fixes)
items.description: Fixed all 4 blockers and 3 worthwhile minors in the auth-passkey-management-list block. Step-up now fires unconditionally before both default and adapter delete paths; queryCredentials override is actually called; message keys renamed to spec; test asserts step-up in adapter path.

items.name: auth-api-key-created-modal
items.title: auth-api-key-created-modal
items.description: One-time display modal for a freshly-created raw API key. Enforces explicit acknowledgement before allowing dismiss. No data operations — purely presentational.

items.name: auth-account-danger-card
items.title: auth-account-danger-card
items.description: Danger zone card that initiates the account-deletion flow with step-up auth gate and inline success/error states.

items.name: auth-account-deletion-confirm-page
items.title: auth-account-deletion-confirm-page
items.description: Next.js page that handles /auth/delete-account?token=...&user_id=... email links. Calls confirmDeleteAccount on mount and renders three outcome states: processing (spinner), success (redirect after 2s), expired/invalid/error (inline CTA). Data path: useConfirmDeleteAccountMutation from @/generated/auth.

items.name: auth-api-key-create-dialog
items.title: API Key Create Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog form for creating a user-scoped API key, with high-severity step-up gating and one-time key handoff to auth-api-key-created-modal on success.

items.name: auth-account-security-card
items.title: auth-account-security-card
items.description: At-a-glance security posture summary card: password status, TOTP MFA status, and passkey count. Display-only with action callbacks. Supports query adapter for non-Constructive backends.

items.name: shell-sidebar
items.title: ShellSidebar
items.description: Collapsible application sidebar — primary nav rail with icon-only collapsed mode, localStorage persistence, keyboard shortcut toggle (Mod+B), permission-gated nav items, sub-item expansion, and render-prop slots for context-switcher and account-menu.

items.name: shell-header
items.title: shell-header
items.description: Top application bar providing logo slot, breadcrumbs slot, optional search input, command palette trigger (Cmd+K), account menu slot, and sidebar hamburger toggle (mobile only). Pure layout block — no data fetching.

items.name: shell-breadcrumbs
items.title: Shell Breadcrumbs
items.description: Route-based breadcrumb trail for the app shell. Parses usePathname() and maps path segments to human-readable labels via a consumer-provided resolveLabel function, with optional explicit segments override and ellipsis collapsing.

items.name: shell-command-palette
items.title: Shell Command Palette
items.description: Auth-aware Cmd+K command palette with provider-based command registration, built-in commands from useCurrentUserQuery, and async-safe onError routing.

items.name: shell-notifications
items.title: shell-notifications
items.description: Notification center popover block (bell icon + panel) for shell-header. Backend-pending data block with graceful degradation. Ships requires.json, use-notifications utility hook, and pure-layout component.

items.name: shell-account-menu
items.title: Shell Account Menu
items.description: Dropdown showing current user avatar + display name as trigger, with Account settings link and Sign out action (delegated to auth-sign-out-button). Shell-block exception: navigates to signOutRedirectHref after sign-out.

items.name: auth-social-buttons
items.title: auth-social-buttons
items.description: Row of OAuth provider sign-in / sign-up buttons with DB query or static provider list, loading skeletons, error handling, and host callback seams.

items.name: auth-cross-origin-link
items.title: Cross-Origin Link
items.description: Generates a one-time cross-origin auth token via `requestCrossOriginToken` and navigates to the destination origin with the token appended as `?token=`.

items.name: auth-mfa-totp-challenge
items.title: MFA TOTP Challenge
items.description: 6-digit TOTP code input card for MFA challenge step, with device trust checkbox, spec-compliant accessibility attributes, and normalized paste/input handling.

items.name: auth-mfa-totp-enroll
items.title: auth-mfa-totp-enroll
items.description: Three-step TOTP enrollment block: QR setup → code verify → backup codes (delegated to [[auth-mfa-backup-codes-display]]). Backend-pending CASE (b): all three procedures undeployed; onSubmit/onConfirm/onGenerateCodes override seams are primary path.

items.name: auth-mfa-totp-disable-confirm
items.title: MFA TOTP Disable Confirm
items.description: Confirmation dialog for disabling TOTP; requires high-severity step-up before calling disable_totp.

items.name: auth-mfa-backup-codes-display
items.title: MFA Backup Codes Display
items.description: One-time display card for MFA backup codes — 2-column code grid, copy-all, download-as-txt, and an optional confirmation checkbox gate before the caller can proceed.

items.name: auth-account-api-keys-list
items.title: Account API Keys List
items.description: Displays user API keys with revoke action and create-key composition; list rows supplied by the host adapter (no generated list hook — user_api_keys is private schema, no public Connection type).

items.name: auth-social-providers-grid
items.title: auth-social-providers-grid
items.description: Grid layout for OAuth providers with Last used badge, mode-aware labels, and localStorage persistence.

items.name: auth-mfa-totp-challenge-page
items.title: auth-mfa-totp-challenge-page
items.description: Next.js page mounted at /auth/mfa/totp. Reads ?token= and ?redirect= from useSearchParams, mounts MfaTotpChallenge, and routes on success. Shows error cards for missing-token and expired states.

items.name: auth-mfa-backup-codes-regenerate
items.title: MFA Backup Codes Regenerate
items.description: Confirmation dialog that gates behind high-tier step-up, calls generate_backup_codes(), then hands off to auth-mfa-backup-codes-display for code presentation and confirmation.

items.name: auth-anonymous-sign-in-button
items.title: Anonymous Sign-In Button
items.description: Single-click guest session button that creates an anonymous session without credentials — for try-before-you-register flows.

items.name: auth-magic-link-request-card
items.title: Magic Link Request Card
items.description: Email-only form that initiates the magic-link sign-in flow; transitions to a neutral confirmation state within the card on success (no navigation, no account enumeration).

items.name: auth-magic-link-sent-page
items.title: Magic Link Sent Page
items.description: Post-submission confirmation page for the magic-link sign-in flow. Displays the target email, a resend CTA with 60-second cooldown, and navigation links back to the request form and sign-in page.

items.name: auth-magic-link-callback-page
items.title: auth-magic-link-callback-page (blockers fixed)
items.description: Magic-link callback page block with all reviewer blockers and worthwhile minors resolved.

items.name: auth-email-otp-request-card
items.title: auth-email-otp-request-card
items.description: Email-only form that sends a one-time passcode to the user's email. On success, transitions to a code-sent state — by default renders [[auth-email-otp-input]] inline (showOtpInputInline=true), or shows confirmation + resend with onSuccess for navigation (showOtpInputInline=false). BACKEND-PENDING (CASE b): send_email_otp not yet deployed; onSubmit override is the primary network path.

items.name: auth-email-otp-input
items.title: Email OTP Input
items.description: 6-segment OTP code input with countdown timer, resend CTA, and attempt feedback for email OTP sign-in flows.

items.name: auth-passkey-enroll
items.title: auth-passkey-enroll
items.description: WebAuthn passkey enrollment block — two-step begin/finish ceremony with injectable override seam.

items.name: auth-passkey-sign-in
items.title: auth-passkey-sign-in
items.description: WebAuthn assertion (sign-in) block with button and conditional UI (autofill picker) support. Orchestrates the begin/browser/finish ceremony via the shipped utility hook or a consumer-supplied onSubmit override.

items.name: auth-account-phones-list
items.title: auth-account-phones-list
items.description: Phone number list block for authenticated accounts — add, verify (inline OTP), set-primary, delete.

items.name: auth-invitation-acceptance-card
items.title: auth-invitation-acceptance-card (blocker fixes)
items.description: Fixed all three reviewer blockers: B2 (InviteAcceptResult type), B1 (conditional setAccepted guard + pending state), B3 (new tests for result:false / null paths).

items.name: user-context-switcher
items.title: User Context Switcher
items.description: Dropdown allowing the signed-in user to switch the active 'acting as' context between their personal account and any orgs they are a member of. Demonstrates Constructive's unified User model.

items.name: org-create-card
items.title: Org Create Card
items.description: Multi-step wizard to create a new organization (users row with type=2). Three steps: display name + slug with debounced availability check, optional logo upload, confirm summary + submit. Binds to useCreateUserMutation and useUsersQuery from @/generated/auth.

items.name: org-members-list
items.title: Org Members List
items.description: Paginated org member list with role chips, inline role-change selector, remove-member (gated by step-up medium/high based on admin status), and transfer-ownership (gated by step-up high). All sensitive actions require step-up before mutation fires.

items.name: org-invite-dialog
items.title: OrgInviteDialog
items.description: Dialog for inviting members to an org by email with optional role assignment. Shows pending invites list with resend and cancel actions. Resend = cancel + re-create (resendOrgInvite backend procedure pending).

items.name: org-roles-editor
items.title: Org Roles Editor
items.description: Admin card for creating, editing, and deleting named org role profiles backed by the host's generated admin SDK hooks.

items.name: org-settings-form
items.title: org-settings-form
items.description: Org settings form with display name, URL slug, and danger-zone deletion (step-up gated).

items.name: org-app-memberships
items.title: OrgAppMemberships
items.description: Admin block for managing an org's app-level memberships: approve, revoke (with step-up), and profile-update via a Select dropdown. Uses three generated admin SDK hooks (query + two mutations). Revoke is gated behind a confirmation dialog and step-up at tier 'medium'.

items.name: auth-invitation-acceptance-page
items.title: auth-invitation-acceptance-page
items.description: Next.js page wrapper for /invite route. Enforces auth gate via useCurrentUserQuery, redirects unauthenticated users to SIGN_IN_PATH with encoded return URL, shows loading skeleton during auth resolution, renders InvitationAcceptanceCard for signed-in users, handles accept/decline routing.

items.name: auth-account-settings-page
items.title: auth-account-settings-page
items.description: Tabbed account settings page composing all account-settings section cards. Calls useCurrentUserQuery at mount, wraps inner content in Suspense per Next.js 15 requirements, and gates the API keys tab behind an allowApiKeys prop.

items.name: auth-sso-setup-card
items.title: auth-sso-setup-card
items.description: SSO setup placeholder card (v2 stub) — presentational block with full i18n message catalog. No data binding.
items.docs: Renders a card describing OIDC/SAML SSO capability with a coming-soon notice. All user-visible labels are in the SsoSetupCardMessages catalog and overridable via the messages prop.

items.name: auth-sso-sign-in-card
items.title: auth-sso-sign-in-card
items.description: v2 stub: SSO-initiated sign-in card with email-domain lookup surface; backend procedures deferred (no @/generated import, no data binding).

items.name: auth-domain-verification-step
items.title: Auth Domain Verification Step
items.description: DNS TXT-record verification UI stub for SSO domain ownership. Displays the TXT record name and value derived from props, with copy-to-clipboard per field, a manual "Check now" trigger, and a status badge. Backend polling is deferred (v2 SSO procedures not yet deployed).

items.name: org-scim-token-generation-card
items.title: Org SCIM Token Generation Card
items.description: Presentational stub for SCIM bearer token generation — deferred until the SCIM backend (generate_scim_token / revoke_scim_token procedures + scim_providers table) ships in constructive-db.

items.name: org-scim-connections-list
items.title: Org SCIM Connections List
items.description: Backend-pending presentational stub that renders an informational empty state for SCIM provider connections. Full data block deferred until the scim_providers schema and revoke_scim_token procedure ship.

items.name: org-scim-setup-guide
items.title: Org SCIM Setup Guide
items.description: v2 stub: static SCIM 2.0 configuration guide card with provider selector (Okta, Azure AD, JumpCloud, Google Workspace, Generic), copyable endpoint URL, bearer token instructions, and attribute mapping table — no backend binding until scim_providers table ships.

items.name: chat
items.title: Chat Widget
items.description: AI chat widget with page context awareness, settings panel, and floating UI. Built on Vercel AI SDK.
